context.document_title: Die Reise zu den Grenzen des Bewusstseins und zurück
context.description: German preface for a philosophical book on consciousness, titled "Die Reise zu den Grenzen des Bewusstseins und zurück." The author apologizes for the dense style, explains the book as a compromise between perfectionism and practicality, and frames it as a short account of decades of experiences on a strange journey.
normalization_notes: Translated the visible German heading "Vorwort" to the canonical preface/introduction framing.

fields.work_title: Die Reise zu den Grenzen des Bewusstseins und zurück

rows.paragraph_text: The preface introduces a self-aware, reflective tone and apologizes for the author's dense writing style. It presents the book as a compromise between perfectionism and practicality and as a short account of decades of experiences on a strange journey.

content.free_text: book_page book_front_matter preface_or_introduction Book preface by the author of "Die Reise zu den Grenzen des Bewusstseins und zurück". Self-reflective introduction about style, compromise, and a decades-long journey through consciousness-related experiences.
